---
title: "naming"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# naming

## variables

* Lowercase
* Do not use underlines if it is not necessary.

```{julia}
tangduogeng = 250
tangduogeng_wangchuqin = 500
```

## functions

* Lowercase
* Do not use underlines if it is not necessary.
* Active sentence structure
* End with `!` if the function modifies its arguments.

## macro 

* Lowercase
* Do not use underlines if it is not necessary.

## Types 

* UpperCamelCase

## Modules

* UpperCamelCase
* Do not over-abbreviate.
